name: energetic
description: Action cooking with sizzling woks, fast cuts, and the raw street food energy of Malaysian night markets. This mood captures the adrenaline of cooking at speed — tossing, flipping, plating — with the urgency and excitement of hawker culture.

style.lighting: dramatic fire glow | high contrast street lighting | fast-moving light sources
style.color_grade: high contrast warm | fiery orange and red accents | deep shadows
style.camera: fast whip pans | slow-motion sizzle | dynamic angles and movement
style.composition: action-first framing | ingredients mid-air | toss and catch moments
style.props: blazing wok, tossing spatula, street food cart, ingredient mise en place, fire flame

copy_tone: High-energy and punchy. Short sentences. Action verbs. Sizzle. Flip. Serve. Creates urgency and excitement. Reads like sports commentary for cooking.
example_prompt_fragment: A dynamic street food cooking action shot, wok tossed ingredients frozen mid-air with visible flames beneath, high contrast dramatic lighting, fast-motion blur on the chef's hands, night market background with bokeh lights, deep shadows with fiery orange highlights, close-up sizzling oil splatter, editorial street food photography style
